mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Criminal Defense in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Blair Jones at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Criminal Defense serving Ogden. Blair Jones is an award-winning attorney at Just Work Comp Law, devoting 100% of his practice to assisting injured workers. Mr. Jones has a diverse legal background, having honed his litigation skills across various jurisdictions and courtrooms. He has successfully represented numerous injured workers in complex workers’ compensation claims, criminal defendants in high-profile cases, and children and parents in protective services removals. He obtained a Bachelor's degree from the University of Utah and a Juris Doctor from Western State University College of Law. Mr. Jones is licensed in Texas (2007), Colorado (2014), and Utah (2018), and admitted to the U.S. District Courts for the Western District of Texas. He is a member of the Salt Lake County Bar Association, Central Utah Bar Association, J. Rueben Clark Law Society, Williamson County Bar Association, Texas Criminal Defense Lawyer Association, and Williamson County Criminal Defense Lawyer Association. When not advocating for clients, Mr. Jones enjoys spending time in the mountains with his wife and three children. To retain Blair Jones for your workers' compensation case, contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290. Contact us at 801-746-0290.

mainEntity.name: Does Blair Jones handle Criminal Defense cases in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Blair Jones at Just Work Comp Law specializes in Criminal Defense and serves clients in Ogden and surrounding areas.
